channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: Energy Infrastructure and the Defense Industrial Base
item.description: This paper recommends extending defense-critical electric infrastructure designations to industrial nodes, creating dedicated permitting and finance pathways to facilitate energy production, and integrating energy resilience into supply chain risk assessments.

item.title: SBIR and STTR Reauthorization and the Future of Small Business Innovation
item.description: The United States Senate has passed legislation to reauthorize the Small Business Innovation Research (SBIR) and Small Business Technology Transfer (STTR) programs through fiscal year 2031, though challenges remain to catalyze the long-term growth of small businesses.
